name: stack-grid
style: Tool-catalog editorial. Lavender tool tiles, lime cost callout, invoice-style receipt slide.

slides.description: Lavender eyebrow + 2-line hero ('$0 stack' in lime) + sub + meta (tools/cost/free-tier/setup).
2-column grid of 6-8 tool tiles (lavender ico, name, role, lime price).
Deep-dive card #1 (e.g. Claude). Head block + why + 3 stats + pull-quote with lime left-border.
3 reasons rows. Lime icon boxes, dark cards.
Invoice-style cost receipt. Free items shown in mint. Lime total bar.
Lavender eyebrow + 2-line headline (lime 'Ship the weekend') + lime button.

notes: 3 deep-dives is the budget — pick tools where the 'why' is strongest, not just your most-used.
Cost receipt must match real pricing — check before publishing, tool prices change.
